ddls:
CREATE TABLE "thermal_imagery" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal image */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the image */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the image */,
  "bright_ti4" REAL /* Brightness temperature (TI4) */,
  "scan" REAL /* Scan angle */,
  "track" REAL /* Track number */,
  "acq_date" TEXT /* Acquisition date */,
  "acq_time" TEXT /* Acquisition time */,
  "satellite" TEXT /* Satellite used for acquisition */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the image */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the image */,
  "bright_ti5" REAL /* Brightness temperature (TI5) */,
  "frp" REAL /* Fire Radiative Power (FRP) */,
  "daynight" TEXT /* Day or night acquisition (D/N) */,
  "image_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the thermal image */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the thermal image */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the thermal image file */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the thermal image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the satellite was launched */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the satellite (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "orbit_type" TEXT /* Type of orbit (e.g., polar, geostationary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal image */,
  "acq_date" TEXT /* Acquisition date */,
  "acq_time" TEXT /* Acquisition time */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite used for acquisition */,
  "acq_altitude" REAL /* Altitude at which the image was acquired */,
  "acq_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image at the time of acquisition */,
  "acq_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisition_metadata_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisition_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES thermal_imagery ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal image accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the image was accessed */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES thermal_imagery ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotspot */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal image where the hotspot was detected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotspot */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotspot */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the hotspot detection */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the hotspot was detected */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the hotspot was detected */,
  "hotspot_size" REAL /* Size of the hotspot */,
  "hotspot_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the hotspot */,
  "hotspot_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the hotspot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotspots_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES thermal_imagery ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wildfires" (
  "wildfire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wildfire */,
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotspot that triggered the wildfire */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the wildfire */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the wildfire */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the wildfire */,
  "damage" TEXT /* Description of the damage caused by the wildfire */,
  "wildfire_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the wildfire (e.g., natural, human-induced) */,
  "wildfire_spread_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the wildfire is spreading */,
  "wildfire_containment_status" TEXT /* Containment status of the wildfire (e.g., contained, uncontained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wildfire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildfires_hotspot_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotspot_id") REFERENCES hotspots ("hotspot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wildfire_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "wildfire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildfire */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the wildfire */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the wildfire */,
  "damage" TEXT /* Description of the damage caused by the wildfire */,
  "wildfire_size" REAL /* Size of the wildfire */,
  "wildfire_spread_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the wildfire spread historically */,
  "wildfire_containment_status" TEXT /* Historical containment status of the wildfire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildfire_history_wildfire_id FOREIGN KEY ("wildfire_id") REFERENCES wildfires ("wildfire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics of the model (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Deployment status of the model (e.g., in production, in testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Deployment status of the version (e.g., in production, in testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the training data */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the training data was created */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the training data file */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the training data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
